61: 'bool parseLineDirective(const std::string& line) {\n'
62: '  // Match: # number "filename" [flags]\n'

64: '  std::smatch match;\n'

observation.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
with open('task/1/antlr/main.cpp', 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
    for i in range(59, 75):
        line = lines[i]
        print(f'{i+1}: {repr(line)}')"
